description_long: This is a decorative, rectangular carriage clock with a metallic gold frame and a prominent circular clock face set against a swirling, turquoise-green background. The clock features a glossy, reflective surface, with a handle on top for portability and four small finials at each corner of the upper frame. The front face displays Roman numerals and two hands, while the back face is covered by a reflective, gold-toned disc. The sides are transparent, revealing the swirling green interior, and the base is flat and metallic. The overall design is ornate and elegant, suitable for display in upscale or traditional environments.
description: A gold-framed, rectangular carriage clock with a circular Roman numeral face and a swirling turquoise background, featuring a top handle and glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows a gold frame with a reflective gold disc and swirling turquoise background, but no visible clock face.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the transparent side panels and the swirling turquoise interior, with the gold frame and handle visible.
description_view_2: Front view with the clock face visible, showing Roman numerals and two hands set against a turquoise background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the transparent side and swirling turquoise interior.
attribute_face_design: Circular face with Roman numerals, two hands, and a clean, white background set within a gold bezel.
